text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During my lunch break, I head to the student
council office in search of Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Please allow us to make an academy shrine
honoring Shiraoki." Rejected.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Quit erasing my magic circles from the wall!"
Complete and utter idiocy. Rejected.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Would it be possible to add more varieties of
protein powder to the school store?" Hmm...
That's worth considering.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm checking the Suggestion Box.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not a suggestion box, the Suggestion Box. It's an app we provide for the academy's students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It allows them to share their suggestions on how
to improve life on campus.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But with so many suggestions, we can't possibly
cover each and every one of them at our student
council meetings.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why I vet them beforehand and decide
which are worthy of being discussed with the
whole student council.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's just our school, but many of the
requests we receive are very... unique.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Air Groove has to check through whole piles of
requests like the ones I just heard, it can't be an
easy task.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Please end curfew a little earlier in the mornings.
I want to go out running before dawn."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Get some sleep, Suzuka. Rejected.
choice_data_list: I should try to clear up my work too.
I should try to clear up my work too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Get some sleep, Suzuka. Rejected.
choice_data_list: I should try to clear up my work too.
I should try to clear up my work too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Looking for something to do?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I can handle this task on my own, but I
would appreciate your help with something else.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That took less time than I thought it would. Phew,
all done for the day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you still have a moment? If you do, let's head
to the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We've implemented a suggestion from Hishi
Akebono. There should be a new dessert on the
menu.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even I like to reward myself after a hard day's
work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove starts walking away, so I hurry after
her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that would be best. I'll be counting on you
this afternoon, so make sure you're prepared.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. Did you come here to ask me something
about this task of yours?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll lend an ear if you keep it short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I discuss this afternoon's training with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we're done, Air Groove gets back to the
mountain of paperwork atop her desk.
